name: Ancient Dragon Knight's Cookbook (1)
description: Ancient Dragon Knight's Cookbook [1] is a Cookbook in Elden Ring. Ancient Dragon Knight's Cookbook [1] is a brand new Cookbook in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Cookbooks are records of crafting techniques that players can use to learn how to craft a wide variety of  items.

name: Revered Spirit Ash
description: Revered Spirit Ash is an Upgrade Material in Elden Ring, debuting in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. These special items are optional Upgrade Materials that can be used at any Sites of Grace to boost summoned spirits and the spectral steed's abilities to deal and negate damage.

name: Scadutree Fragment
description: Scadutree Fragment is an Upgrade Material in Elden Ring, debuting in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Scadutree Fragments are optional consumables that can be used to simultaneously enhance offensive and defensive capabilities at any Sites of Grace, acting like a permanent boost to your damage dealt and damage negation in the Land of Shadow.

name: Black Syrup
description: Black Syrup is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location:
Given by Moore outside Belurat, Tower Settlement after meeting Thiollier [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map].NOTE: 
 This item becomes unobtainable once Moore leaves his location outside Belurat, Tower Settlement, or commits suicide. 
 If Thiollier leaves his initial location to search for St. Trina, Moore will no longer give this item: 
   
   WARNING: If you haven't met Thiollier but satisfied one of the conditions for him to start searching for St. Trina, such as defeating Golden Hippopotamus or entering the Church District, exercise caution when speaking to Thiollier, as he will leave straight away after talking to him two times. To avoid locking out from this item, speak to him only once, then return to Moore to get the syrup, then back to Thiollier for his concoction.  
    
 After Miquella's charm is broken and Moore falls into despair, you can still obtain this item: 
   
   If you've met Thiollier: you can choose the dialogue option "Put it behind you" when speaking to Moore, and then talk to him again immediately afterwards before resting at a Site of Grace or leaving the area, and he will give you the syrup. 
   If you haven't met Thiollier yet, or simply want to prevent Moore from moving locations, you can choose the option "I don't know" when he asks you "Must we be sad forever?". He will stay at his location, and you can obtain the syrup from him later. Once you've met Thiollier you can go back to Moore and say "Put it behind you", then after speaking to Moore again before he leaves, he will finally give the syrup. 
    
 To avoid the easily triggered lockout conditions, it is recommended to obtain it as soon as possible, ideally before even entering Scadu Altus.

name: Cross Map
description: Cross Map is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Speak to Hornsent when you first meet him in Gravesite Plain and exhaust his dialogue to obtain the item. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Gaol Lower Level Key
description: Gaol Lower Level Key is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: The Gaol Lower Level Key can be found in the lower level of the Lamenter's Gaol. After using the Gaol Upper Level Key and descending the ladder, follow the path until you can climb a rocky ledge on your right. Take the left door, go ahead, jump down, and follow the wooden path. At the first entrance, take a left and continue straight. Climb down the rocks where you'll find a chest with the Gaol Lower Level Key inside.  [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Gaol Upper Level Key
description: Gaol Upper Level Key is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Can be found within Lamenter's Gaol. When you enter, proceed until you reach a fork in the path. Take the left turn, and after a short walk, enter the room on your right. Inside, you'll find a chest containing the Gaol Upper Level Key. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Heart of Bayle
description: Heart of Bayle is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Dropped by Bayle the Dread. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Hole-Laden Necklace
description: Hole-Laden Necklace is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Cathedral of Manus Metyr: Given by Count Ymir when first interacted. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Igon's Furled Finger
description: Igon's Furled Finger is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Will be given by Igon by interacting with him after defeating the Jagged Peak Drake in the area. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Keep Wall Key
description: Keep Wall Key is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC but was cut from the DLC's release. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.

name: Larval Tear
description: Larval Tears are Key Items in Elden Ring. A Larval Tear is a material needed by Rennala to grant rebirth. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or given by a related NPC, which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location:
All Larval Tear Locations in Shadow of the Erdtree Video 
   
    
    
        
     
    
   
  
  
    
  
 Shadow of the ErdtreeLarval Tears in the Realm of Shadow can be found in the middle of a ring of glowing gravestones that glow blue. These locations and the Larval Tears within only appear during nighttime.  
 Prospect Town: Located southeast of the large ruins on a small hill. [Map Link] 
 Scorched Ruins: Can be found southeast of Scorched Ruins.   [Map Link] 
 Suppressing Pillar: Can be found northeast of the Suppressing Pillar.  [Map Link] 
 Church of the Crusade: Can be found south of the Church of the crusade.. [Map Link] 
 Abandoned Ailing Village: Can be found south of the Abandoned Ailing Village, or just east from the Greatbridge, North site of grace. [Map Link] 
 Rabbath's Rise: Can be found west of Rabbath's Rise. [Map Link] 
 Messmer's Army Encampment: Can be found east of Messmer's Army Encampment. [Map Link] 
 Rauh Base: Can be found on the cliff above Fog Rift Catacombs, southwest of the Ancient Ruins Base Site of Grace. [Map Link] 
 Rauh Base: Can be found northwest of the Ravine North Site of Grace. [Map Link] 
 Base GameLimgrave 
 Dropped by a Lesser Runebear disguised as a lone sword-wielding Wandering Noble standing directly east of the Agheel Lake South site of grace. [Map link] 
Liurnia of the Lakes 
 Found in the graveyard at the Village of the Albinaurics. [Map link] 
 Dropped by a Grafted Scion disguised as a Giant Crayfish patrolling around the gazebo between Rose Church and Boilprawn Shack. There are four Giant Crayfish in this area; three of them are sleeping, and one is patrolling. The disguised Grafted Scion is the one patrolling. Easily reached by: 
   
   Going south from Fallen Ruins of the Lake site of grace, or 
   Going northeast from Folly on the Lake site of grace, or 
   Going northwest from Boilprawn Shack site of grace. [Map link] 
    
 Found in the graveyard east of Caria Manor after obtaining the Resurrection Painting. This area can only be reached after defeating Royal Knight Loretta. The item is found by touching a ghost sitting on a chair at the graveyard. The ghost disappears as soon as you touch it and the Larval Tear will appear on the ground along with a Juvenile Scholar Cap and Juvenile Scholar Robe. [Map link] 
 Purchased from Pidia, Carian Servant for 3,000 runes (one available). He can be reached after defeating Royal Knight Loretta, then jumping down the cliffs from the southeastern side of the Three Sisters sub-area onto a balcony. 
Caelid 
 Dropped by a Troll disguised as a Wandering Noble in Caelid, by the stone coffins on the cliff south of the Caelid Highway South site of grace. The disguised Troll is the one kneeling at the western end. [Map Link] 
Altus Plateau 
 Dropped by a Lion Guardian disguised as an Wandering Noble cowering in a corner in the unnamed ruins south of Windmill Village. The ruins are on the clifftops, most easily reached by going north from the Rampartside Path site of grace. [Map link] 
Mt.Gelmir 
 Dropped by a Wormface disguised as a flaming Putrid Corpse, east of the Road of Iniquity site of grace. The enemy is next to the first fire of the ruined camp. [Map link] 
Consecrated Snowfield 
 Dropped by a Lesser Runebear disguised as a Wandering Noble, in the Consecrated Snowfield. The disguised bear is half-buried in snow, with two nobles standing next to it. They are located southeast of the Inner Consecrated Snowfield site of grace.[Map link] 
Siofra River 
 Purchased from the Nomadic Merchant in Siofra River, for 3,000 Runes (one available). [Map link] [Video Location] 
Nokron, Eternal City 
 Found on a corpse inside the stone building southeast of the Nokron, Eternal City site of grace. [Map link] [Video location] 
 Found on a corpse in the middle of a gazebo in Nokron, Eternal City. When approaching the corpse, Silver Tears will fall down from the ceiling. [Map link] [Video location] 
 Dropped by a Silver Sphere in Night's Sacred Ground. [Map link] [Video location] 
 Two (2) dropped by Mimic Tear when defeated. [Map link] [Video location] 
Nokstella, Eternal City 
 Dropped by a Silver Sphere on the bridge in Nokstella, Eternal City. [Map link] 
 Dropped by a Silver Sphere hanging from the ceiling in the northeast building after the bridge in Nokstella, Eternal City. You can deal damage to it at range, but don't land the killing blow while it's still on the ceiling, because the dropped item will be unreachable. [Elden Ring Map Here] 
 Dropped by a Silver Sphere after the bridge and up the stairs, in the building immediately after reaching the top, in Nokstella, Eternal City. It is hanging from the ceiling, dripping Silver Tears. [Elden Ring Map Here]

name: Map: Abyss
description: Map: Abyss is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location:
Map of the Abbys at the east of the Gravesite Plain. Found besides a column. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map] 
 It can be found by going through the Darklight Catacombs and defeating the Boss, Jori Elder Inquisitor 
 After defeating the boss you can then proceed through the archway and into the Abyss and grab the map

location: To find this Map Fragment, travel directly northeast from when you first entered the Shadow Realm. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map]

name: Map: Rauh Ruins
description: Map: Rauh Ruins is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Start from the Moorth Ruins Site of Grace in Scadu Atlus.  Head northeast to find a cave next to a pond near the rock cliff and near some Spirit Eels (tall glowing worms).   Follow the cave tunnel to the Ancient Ruins Base. Next, follow the canyon and you'll find the map just outside the Temple Town Ruins. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map]

location: It can be found if you continue the path forward past the Highroad Cross Site of Grace, you will eventually run into it. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map]

description: Prayer Room Key is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Church of the Crusade: Acquired as a drop upon defeating the NPC Invader Fire Knight Queelign. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Ruins Map
description: Ruins Map is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Given by Count Ymir when first met at the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Storeroom Key
description: Storeroom Key is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Key Item in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Belurat Tower Settlement: From the top of the waterfall, you will find a room with a ladder, enter the room and climb the ladder. At the top, you will find a corpse with the Storeroom Key. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]

name: Well Depths Key
description: Well Depths Key is a Key Item in Elden Ring. It is a Key Item found in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Key Items in Elden Ring include a wide variety of items found in specific locations or are given by a related NPCs which are used to unlock areas, quests, and to further progress the game's story.
location: Belurat Tower Settlement:  After unlocking the double doors shortcut next to the Belurat, Tower Settlement Site of Grace, take the elevator up. Follow the stairs up and to the right until you reach a broken bridge next to walkable rooftops guarded by Gravebirds. On the first roof's South-East corner, look down. There is a drapery you can drop on that leads to the short roofed bridge leading to the next building. Entering the bridge, go east, enter the room with two enemies and you will find the Well Depths Key there. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]
